rationale: Spec requires maxSetVersion and maxElectionId as public API fields; driver only had them as private instance variables.
Race condition: isMaster response changes mid-execution causes nil reference; implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
SDAM spec defines event ordering for forced vs. discovered standalone topology; Ruby driver emits wrong event sequence.
Bug in == method only checks receiver's keys; implementation equality bug, no spec rule about ServerDescription comparison semantics.
SDAM spec requires immutable descriptions; driver mutates previous topology when updating maxElectionId/maxSetVersion.
Sending duplicate server closed events violates SDAM monitoring spec; server closed event must fire exactly once on disconnection.
SDAM spec states 'The client's constructor MUST NOT do any I/O'; driver blocks on I/O during construction.
Moving API docs to api.mongodb.com; documentation hosting task, no driver behavior involved.
Removing deprecated has_rdoc from gemspec; packaging cleanup, no driver behavior involved.
Removing deprecated has_rdoc from Kerberos gemspec; packaging cleanup, no driver behavior involved.
Removing inspector classes as internal refactor; step toward spec alignment but no specific rule violated, code already non-functional.
Extracting SDAM flow into its own class for readability; internal refactor with no behavior change.
Three specific SDAM spec deviations: success check missing, ok field handling wrong, Other/Unknown/Ghost type separation incorrect.
Test infrastructure: background monitoring threads cause race conditions in test setup; test tooling fix, not driver behavior.
Implementation fix for constructor wait when monitoring thread dies; race condition fix, no specific spec rule about this scenario.
Explicitly rewrites topology state transitions to match SDAM spec TopologyType table; prior implementation was non-compliant.
Adding warn-level logging on server removal; diagnostic improvement, not mandated by any spec rule.
SDAM spec defines Other as distinct from Unknown server type; driver reports Other as Unknown in events.
Adding verification of setVersion/electionId to stale primary spec tests; expanding spec test assertions, not fixing driver behavior.
SDAM spec requires immutable descriptions; driver's Description#unknown! method mutates server description in place.
Improving SDAM event log output formatting (camel case, shorter names); cosmetic logging change, no spec rule involved.
Renaming internal topology constructor option from replica_set to replica_set_name; API naming refactor, no spec behavior change.
SDAM monitoring spec requires events only when description actually changes; driver fires changed events on every heartbeat.
Simplifying primary detection using new topology classes; internal refactor leveraging architectural change, no spec rule involved.
SDAM monitoring spec defines event ordering; server description references single topology before topology changed event is emitted.
No spec tests exist for server added/removed events or event sequencing; adding new spec test coverage for SDAM monitoring.
Auditing and adding spec-required fields missing from topology descriptions; systematic spec compliance gap.
Removing legacy, non-functional topology event classes; dead code cleanup, no driver behavior change.
Authentication errors after upgrade causing restarts; user-reported regression with no specific spec rule cited, unclear root cause.
Spec-required SDAM fields (setVersion, electionId) not properly transferred across topology instances or available on all topology types.
SDAM spec requires TopologyDescription to have servers set; Ruby Topology has no server knowledge, breaking event dispatch and monitoring.
SDAM spec requires incompatible server to mark entire TopologyDescription incompatible; driver only checks per-server compatibility.
Spec requires logicalSessionTimeoutMinutes on topology as minimum across servers; driver only implements it on individual servers.
Adding server addresses to topology log summaries; diagnostic logging improvement, no spec rule about log format.
Session support determination looks at servers instead of topology description, contrary to spec; explicitly filed to mirror spec text.
Implementing optional SDAM spec behavior (single topology with set name); not a mandatory rule violation, marked optional in spec.
SDAM spec allowed-configuration-combinations requires at most one seed for single topology; driver did not enforce this constraint.
SDAM wire compatibility spec does not explicitly say to exclude unknown servers; gap causes confusing misleading error messages.
SDAM spec requires processing one ismaster outcome at a time via locks; driver lacked synchronization for description updates.
SDAM spec defines opTime in ServerDescription since server 3.4; driver was missing this required field entirely.
Wire version defaulting to 0 for unknown servers causes confusing messages; implementation UX issue, no spec rule about default wire version.
Deduplicating code across OP_MSG operation classes; internal refactor with no behavior change.
Implementing optional SDAM spec behavior (update topology from handshake ismaster); explicitly marked optional in spec, not a mandatory rule violation.
SDAM spec defines lastUpdateTime in ServerDescription; driver was missing this required spec field.
SDAM spec requires server and topology descriptions to be immutable; adding lint-mode freeze to enforce this spec requirement.
Extending test coverage for topology compatibility per spec PR feedback; adding test cases, not fixing driver behavior.
Performance improvement using semaphore for server selector notification instead of polling sleep; internal optimization, no spec rule.
Investigating slow tests with 3.6 replica set/sharded cluster; performance investigation, no spec behavior involved.
Switching CI test formatter to instafail style; CI tooling improvement, no driver behavior involved.
Refactoring SDAM constructor wait to use lastUpdateTime from RUBY-1567 instead of separate tracking; internal cleanup, no behavior change.
